heading_styles.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
heading_styles.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 mb-4

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3A8A] hover:bg-[#172554] text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-md shadow-sm transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1E3A8A] border border-[#1E3A8A] hover:bg-slate-50 font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-md transition-all duration-200
buttons.cta: bg-[#F97316] hover:bg-[#EA580C] text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-md shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-200 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5

cards.default: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.feature: bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-8 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 border border-slate-100
cards.testimonial: bg-white rounded-xl p-8 shadow-sm border border-slate-100 relative

inputs.default: w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-md border border-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1E3A8A] focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white

hero.alt: Students collaborating in a modern computer lab

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons (e.g., BookOpen, Users, Award, Monitor, Briefcase, GraduationCap).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all Headings and 'Inter' for body text. Add these fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement a sticky header with a clean white background and shadow-sm.
Ensure the Hero section uses a high-quality image on the right and text on the left (or balanced center) for a professional look.
Use the 'Bento Grid' style for the 'Overview' section to display stats and key features.
The 'Career Tracks' section should use hover-elevated cards with clear icons and 'Learn More' buttons.
Testimonials should be a slider or a clean 3-column grid.
Contact form must be clean, with floating labels or clear top labels, using the defined input styles.
Do NOT use heavy gradients. Use subtle slate-50 backgrounds to differentiate sections.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
The primary color #1E3A8A should be dominant in the header, footer, and primary buttons.
Use the specific image URLs provided in the assets section.
For the 'Certification Partners', use a marquee slider with grayscale logos that turn color on hover.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where appropriate (e.g., sticky nav).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can separate good from extraordinary.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
